productDisplayName: Nike Women Legend Slim Poly Grey Track Pants
description: Composition Grey track pants made of 88% polyester and 12% spandex, has a broad elasticated waistband with printed nike swoosh logo, engineered with Dri-Fit technology and has stitch detailing Fit Slim Wash care Machine wash cold with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach iron or dry clean Line dry Stylish to a T, these polyester/spandex pants from nike are engineered with Dri-Fit technology and designed to keep you fresh and comfortable while you sweat it out at the gym or on the track. The broad waistband sits snugly, offering a comfort fit. Team it with Nike performance t-shirts and sports shoes for that smart, sporty look.
